interpretation.displacement: Upper-bound CSI after moving associated forecast objects to observed centroids.
interpretation.intensity: Upper-bound CSI after matching associated-object intensity mass.
interpretation.birth_existence: Upper-bound CSI after inserting missed observed birth objects only.
interpretation.existence: Upper-bound CSI after deleting unmatched forecasts and inserting all missed observations.
interpretation.warning: Oracle gains diagnose error sources; they are not achievable forecast skill.
